Genre table has column 'Name' which should be renamed to 'genre_name' as per task requirements
MediaType table has column 'Name' which should be renamed to 'type_name' as per task requirements
Artist table has column 'Name' which should be renamed to 'artist_name' as per task requirements
Playlist table has column 'Name' which should be renamed to 'playlist_name' as per task requirements
Album table has column 'Title' which should be renamed to 'album_title' as per task requirements

privileged_info_summary: The Chinook database is a real, publicly available music store sample database from https://github.com/lerocha/chinook-database containing 275 artists, 347 albums, 3503 tracks, 59 customers, 412 invoices, 8 employees, and 25 genres. The task requires renaming two tables (InvoiceLine→invoice_line with 2240 rows, PlaylistTrack→playlist_track with 8715 rows) and five columns (Genre.Name→genre_name, MediaType.Name→type_name, Artist.Name→artist_name, Playlist.Name→playlist_name, Album.Title→album_title) to comply with lowercase_snake_case naming convention. All data counts and structural claims in the metadata have been verified against the authoritative Chinook database source.
